arts.ttl: Why Arsenal lead Chelsea in Mathys Tel transfer race as Bayern Munich 'surprise' Mikel Arteta
arts.sum: Arsenal appear to have dented Chelsea's hopes of signing Mathys Tel before the January transfer window slams shut on Monday evening. football.london understands Chelsea did not, however, discuss or offer Christopher Nkunku as part of a swap deal despite Bayern's interest.

arts.ttl: Report: Aston Villa believe they can persuade £10m player to join them instead of Arsenal before deadline day
arts.sum: Martin Odegaard has tried to convince the 18-year-old to join Arsenal 🤯

arts.ttl: Arsenal now preparing bid to sign £40m striker, but he wants to join Man United instead - insider
Arsenal transfer target rejects Nottingham Forest move
arts.sum: Igor Jesus has rejected a €30m move to Nottingham Forest amid rival interest in the Botafogo forward from Arsenal. Jesus has been linked with a move to the Premier League after a rapid rise in Brazilian football. After impressing with a prolific period in the UAE Pro League, Jesus signed for Botafogo in the summer […] The post Arsenal transfer target rejects Nottingham Forest move first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Arsenal and Tottenham Target 'Wants to Join Man Utd'
arts.sum: Man Utd are reportedly interested in signing Mathys Tel, and insider Paul O Keefe has said he favours an Old Trafford move over Arsenal or Tottenham.

arts.ttl: Why Arsenal are not spending in the January transfer window despite Man City's shopping spree
arts.sum: Arsenal supporters have been informed that their club's decision not to spend big in the January transfer window is strategic rather than as a result of fears relating to Profit and Sustainability Rules (PSR). "We know they have not been charged, we know they have been on UEFA’s watchlist recently, so maybe there is a bit of that in there too but from the outside looking in, there is no severe issue with PSR so it does seem to be a conscious decision from Arsenal not to spend but that could change in the next few days."

arts.ttl: Report: Arsenal readying bid for £25m striker who hasn't scored a single goal this season
arts.sum: Arsenal’s approach to the January transfer window seemed to change instantly once the club caught wind how serious Gabriel Jesus’ knee injury was. Jesus won’t...

arts.ttl: “Already making contacts” – Fabrizio Romano’s exciting update on Arsenal & Liverpool transfer target
arts.sum: Arsenal and Liverpool fans may be intrigued to see an update this afternoon from transfer journalist Fabrizio Romano. Although Romano doesn’t specifically mention the Gunners or the Reds, he has said that Premier League clubs are already making contacts over signing highly-rated young Ajax defender Jorrel Hato ahead of the summer. arts.sum: Arsenal have enjoyed a fine Champions League campaign so far, winning five of their seven league phase matches to all but certainly wrap up a place in the last-16

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer target set to cost €70million

It already looks like the Zubimendi to Arsenal deal is advanced ahead of next season, but it could still be that there are some details to work out.
